title: mimulus primuloides subsp. linearifolius
intro: Mimulus primuloides subsp. linearifolius, also known as Yellow Monkey Flower, is a subspecies of flowering plant native to the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mimulus primuloides subsp. linearifolius include its ability to calm the nervous system, reduce stress and anxiety, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and well-being.
